_meta.name: Card Blueprints
_meta.description: Complete self-contained data for the Card Blueprints calculation engine. All reference data needed to compute archetypes, yearly navigation, long range cards, pluto, result, environment, displacement, and karma from any birthday + target date.

structure.solar_values: Solar value (0-52) <-> card notation mapping. Formula: 55 - (2*month + day). 0=Joker, 1-13=Hearts, 14-26=Clubs, 27-39=Diamonds, 40-52=Spades.
structure.planetary_ruling_cards: 366 date entries (M/D format) -> planetary ruling card. Some dates have arrays for dual-PRC.
structure.yearly_spreads: 91 spreads (keys '0'-'90'). Year 0 = spirit spread (natural order, skipped for Long Range). Each has 'crown' (3 cards: [Saturn, Jupiter, Mars]) and 'grid' (7x7 array). Grid rows: Mercury(0)-Neptune(6). Grid cols: Neptune(0)-Mercury(6).
structure.card_descriptions: 52 card profiles with title, core_identity, gifts, shadow, life_direction, gateway.
structure.three_lens: 52 cards x 3 psychological lenses: under (shadow), sweet_spot (evolved), over (compensating).
structure.weekly_card_meanings: 52 cards x 11 positional meanings: environment, long_range, pluto, result, mercury, venus, mars, jupiter, saturn, uranus, neptune.

calculation_rules.birth_card: 55 - (2*month + day). If result < 0: add 52. 0 = Joker (Dec 31 only).
calculation_rules.planetary_ruling_card: Lookup by M/D in planetary_ruling_cards. First entry if array.
calculation_rules.spread_year: age + 1, clamped 0-90. Age uses birthday-to-birthday rule.
calculation_rules.extraction: Find card in grid (or crown). Move LEFT. At col 0: drop down 1 row, restart col 6. Past row 6: enter crown from right (index 2->1->0). Crown exhausted: wrap to grid[0][6]. Extract 9 cards: Mercury(0)-Neptune(6) + Pluto(7) + Result(8).
calculation_rules.long_range: Skip spirit spread (year 0). Cycle = age // 7. Spread = cycle + 1. Position = age % 7. LR card = extraction[position] from that spread.
calculation_rules.environment: Find birth card's home position in Year 0 (spirit spread). Look up that same position in yearly spread.
calculation_rules.displacement: Find birth card's position in yearly spread. Look up that same position in Year 0 (spirit spread).
calculation_rules.fixed_cards: KРЎа, JРЎЦ, 8РЎБ, AРЎБ, 2РЎЦ, 7РЎд, 9РЎЦ have no environment/displacement.
calculation_rules.active_period: Days from birthday: Mercury 1-52, Venus 53-104, Mars 105-156, Jupiter 157-208, Saturn 209-260, Uranus 261-312, Neptune 313-366.
calculation_rules.archetype: Birth card = energy you emit. PRC = how others perceive it. Both extract period cards from same yearly spread. 14 total navigation points.

AРЎБ.title: The Creative Pioneer
AРЎБ.core_identity: You're the intellectual initiator. Ideas come through you first. You're the one who thinks of the new thing, the new way, the new possibility. Your mind is restless, always generating.
AРЎБ.gifts: Original thinking and idea generation; Ability to launch new concepts and projects; Natural curiosity and investigation; Intellectual courage to explore new territory
AРЎБ.shadow: You think starting is the same as finishing. You generate ideas but abandon them when they get difficult. You mistake brainstorming for action. The pattern: you're full of "what ifs" but empty on "what nows." People see you as a dreamer, not a doer. Your intellectual energy goes nowhere because you don't follow through.
AРЎБ.life_direction: Your curriculum is learning that ideas only matter if you execute them. You're learning to pick one and see it through.
AРЎБ.gateway: Your card operates in Clubs (behavioral habits). Algorithm Inoculation challenges you to stay with one action sequence instead of jumping to the next idea. This rewires you from perpetual-brainstormer into actual-builder.

2РЎБ.title: The Collaborative Builder

2РЎБ.gifts: Natural partnership and team-building ability; Excellent communication and articulation; Ability to synthesize different perspectives; Talent for collaborative problem-solving
2РЎБ.shadow: You lose yourself in collaboration. You adapt your thinking to match the other person's, then realize you have no idea what you actually think. The pattern: you're so good at partnership that you disappear into it. You have strong opinions but only voice them to please, then resent the person. You're a people-pleaser who masks it as collaboration.
2РЎБ.life_direction: Your curriculum is learning that true collaboration requires two distinct thinkers, not one chameleon. You're learning to have your own perspective and keep it.
2РЎБ.gateway: Your card operates in Clubs (behavioral habits). Algorithm Inoculation forces you to think for yourself, to stand by your actual opinion even when it disrupts harmony. This rewires you from collaborative-disappearing into collaborative-grounded.
